global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting a weekend escape with flexible booking options at a low price.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A collection of geometric shapes in varying sizes and shades of blue, creating a modern and abstract visual.

elements.label: Overlaying rectangle
elements.description: A prominent rectangle shape overlays the background, adding depth and focus to the design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape positioned towards the bottom left, adding a playful element to the composition.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend' with additional smaller text below, conveying a promotional message.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexible booking options €29.99 Watch now

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo 'DriftPass' appears in a modern font at the top left, prominently displayed against the blue background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, drawing attention to the discount.
